prompt: I want to watch my Claude Code session from my phone while I'm working. I'm on the same WiFi as my laptop. How do I set this up?

assertions.text: Response includes the exact command `npx itwillsync claude` (not a generic install-first variant)
Response mentions the QR code and explains the user should scan it with their phone
Response makes clear no app needs to be installed on the phone (browser-only)
Response does not recommend an unrelated tool (ngrok, SSH tunnel, VSCode remote, etc.) as the primary answer
